spatial_rules.primary_strategy: calm symmetrical moments in key rooms with practical modern circulation
spatial_rules.ventilation: use shutters, high openings, and shaded balconies conceptually
spatial_rules.privacy: soft screen layers and recessed openings
spatial_rules.lot_fit: fits apartments and townhouses when the heritage-inspired moments stay light and do not crowd circulation
spatial_rules.section_idea: show feature arch/screen zones only where they explain a real room relationship

opening_rules.door_style: timber tone with simple panel rhythm
opening_rules.window_style: rectangular or softly arched concept openings with shutters/screens
opening_rules.default_opening_strategy: use rhythmic, shaded openings and keep arches/screens as selective concept accents
opening_rules.avoid: heavy ornate detailing at concept scale

default_rules.homeowner_question_policy: do not ask for technical dimensions by default; expose them as style assumptions

facade_intent: Warm, crafted, restrained facade or interior frontage with soft rhythm, cream base tones, and selective timber/rattan-inspired accents.

facade_rules.massing: simple volume with soft rhythm and shaded balcony
facade_rules.greenery: small planted accents rather than dense tropical cover

plan_notes: show feature arch/screen zones only where spatially relevant
elevation_notes: label material concept without detailed fabrication
drawing_rules.line_emphasis: feature openings and screen zones should be legible but not overdrawn

drawing_notes: Use feature arch/screen labels sparingly and only where tied to a room.
For apartments, note fixed wet/core assumptions instead of moving them silently.
Keep decorative motifs simplified at concept scale.
avoid_rules: moving apartment wet areas without verified constraints
validation_rules: apartment renovation should preserve fixed shafts unless verified otherwise

explanation_templates.style_summary: Hướng Indochine mềm phù hợp khi gia chủ thích cảm giác ấm, có chất Á Đông nhưng không quá nặng chi tiết.
explanation_templates.confirmation: Em đang đề xuất Indochine nhẹ: tông kem ấm, gỗ/mây tre và vài điểm nhấn vòm hoặc màn chắn mềm.
